meaning: n.波斯(西南亚国家,现在的伊朗)
examples: The distillation of rose petals to produce rosewater almost certainly originated in Ancient Persia.
In the seventh century, the Arabs conquered Persia, capturing their magnificent silks in the process.
Then Alexander turned to attack the rest of Persia.
Ubisoft was previously stung by a flawed adaptation of another hit game franchise, Prince Of Persia.
